name: Miles of Golf
about: Miles of Golf is a premier club fitting and practice facility with locations in Ann Arbor and Cincinnati. The venue offers comprehensive services including personalized club fitting, lessons, and a top 100-rated driving range, operating year-round. Their practice facilities feature advanced amenities like heated bays, grass tees, and sheltered hitting areas to ensure comfort and quality regardless of the season.
why_golfers_like_it: Top 100 club fitters in the USA with extensive experience in custom club fitting
State-of-the-art technology including TrackMan, SAM, Quintic, and GC Quad launch monitors
Premier Masters Suites with private bays, food & beverage, and Toptracer technology for events

food_and_drink.notes: Available at Masters Suites for events and gatherings
Available at Masters Suites for events and gatherings

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor used for fitting and instruction
Used for BASIXX fittings with precise ball flight tracking
Swing analysis technology used in fitting process

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are not mentioned, but club fitting services are available to help you find the perfect clubs for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and beverages are available at the Masters Suites, but outside food/drink policies for general practice areas are not specified.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Simulator play time is not specified, but club fitting sessions typically run 1-1.5 hours with 75-100 swings.

faq.question: Is this place kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Miles of Golf offers lessons for juniors/youth and is welcoming for families seeking to improve their golf game together.
